results.title: Circus coming to West Union
results.description: The Culpepper and Merriweather Circus will entertain audience members of all ages Sunday, Aug. 9, at the Fayette County Fairgrounds in West Union. Showtimes for the event, sponsored by the West Union Lions Club, are scheduled for 2 and 4:30...

results.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's guests were 'scanned' for secret recording devices at MSG wedding
results.description: Swift and Kelce, both 36, went to extensive lengths to make sure the scenes inside the venue would not be leaked.

results.title: ‘Salam Aliye’, a musical tribute to Ayatollah Khamenei from Kerala
results.description: Produced by Basheer Pottrath and composed by Nazar Malik, the song is sung by Manikandan Perumpadappu.
